zh-CN.title: Project Management
zh-CN.content:
Store Point

个人粗暴的理解, 就是评估这个需求单时候,给予一个评分, 分为, 复杂度, 工作时长, 存在的风险/不确定因素.

当采用故事点估算时，我们为每个待办项分配一个点数。待办项估算结果的原生数据并不重要，我们只关注最后得到的相对估算结果。一个估算值为2的用户故事应该是估算值为1的用户故事的2倍。而它也应该是另一个估算值为3的用户故事的三分之二.

故事点包括什么内容

由于故事点数代表了开发用户发故事所需的全部工作量，所以团队的估算必须考虑到影响工作量的所有因素。这可能包括：

要开展的工作的数量
工作的复杂度
要开展的工作中存在的任何风险或不确定性
在用故事点估算时，必须要考虑以上每一个因素。让我们看看每个因素是如何影响故事点的。

到底什么是故事点（Story Point）？

en.title: Project Management
en.content:
Store Point

My rough understanding is that when evaluating this requirement, a score is given, which is divided into complexity, working time, and existing risks/uncertainties.

When using story point estimation, we assign one point to each to-do item. The raw data for the to-do item estimation results is not important; we only focus on the final relative estimation result. A user story with an estimated value of 2 should be twice the size of a user story with an estimated value of 1. It should also be two-thirds the size of another user story with an estimated value of 3.

What does the story include?

Since Story Points represent the total effort required to develop users and publish stories, the team's estimate must take into account all factors that affect workload. These may include:

The amount of work to be carried out
Complexity of the work
Any risks or uncertainties that may exist in the work to be carried out.
When estimating story points, each of the above factors must be considered. Let's see how each factor affects story points.

What exactly is a story point?
